responsibilities: Develop and maintain coordinated multi-disciplinary BIM models in Revit to support design and construction phases
Perform clash detection and coordination reviews using Navisworks to identify and resolve design conflicts before construction
Establish and enforce BIM execution plans and modeling standards to ensure consistency across project teams
Generate quantity take-offs and construction documentation directly from BIM models to support estimating and procurement
Coordinate with architects, engineers, and contractors to integrate structural, MEP, and civil models into a unified BIM environment
Create custom Revit families and templates to standardize modeling workflows across multiple projects
Facilitate BIM coordination meetings and document resolution of identified clashes and design issues
Develop 4D scheduling simulations to visualize construction sequencing and identify potential scheduling conflicts
